# Research Task 2 — The Hot Ones rituals (Da Bomb, Last Dab, wing of shame, Explain That Gram)

**Phase:** 1 (run in parallel). **Read-only. Do NOT edit the article.**
**Recommended agent:** research-analyst.

## Why this matters

The article name-drops "the wing of shame" and "The Last Dab" but treats them as scenery,
and never mentions "Explain That Gram." Fans know these as the show's signature beats. One
of them — **The Last Dab** (voluntarily adding _extra_ sauce to the final wing) — is free
thematic money for a Type 6 read: doing the extra-hard thing on purpose is textbook
counterphobic behavior. The writer needs accurate facts to build one tight rituals paragraph.

## What to find (sourced, one short paragraph each)

1. **Da Bomb (wing 8)** — confirm it's the wing-8 "Beyond Insanity" sauce, NOT the hottest by
   Scoville, but the universally dreaded one (bad flavor + heat). Note its cultural in-joke status.
2. **The Last Dab** — confirm the ritual: guest adds an extra dab of the final/hottest sauce to
   the last wing _voluntarily_. Note that First We Feast sells its own "The Last Dab" sauce line.
3. **The wing of shame** — confirm what it refers to (the final/parting wing + closing question).
4. **Explain That Gram** — confirm it's the social-media segment where Evans asks guests about
   their own posts; roughly when it became a regular beat.

## Deliverable

A brief (under ~300 words): one accurate sentence or two per ritual, plus citation URLs.
Add one line flagging which detail best supports the "Last Dab = counterphobic 6" angle.

## Guardrails

- Precision matters here — these are fan-checkable facts. Get the wing numbers/names right.
- Cite each ritual. Flag anything uncertain.
- Don't touch the article file.
